message:
fix: Move generated files to zig-out/ directory

- Change build.zig to read bundle_compiled.c and frozen_functions.c from zig-out/
- Update runtime.zig to output generated files to zig-out/
- Add mkdir zig-out/ before qjsc runs to ensure directory exists
- Add claude_bundle_compiled.c to .gitignore

This prevents stale large files (e.g., 266MB claude_bundle_compiled.c)
from being accidentally picked up by benchmark builds.
